title: cyrtidiorchis alata
intro: Cyrtidiorchis alata, also known as the winged orchid, is a type of orchid plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are often dried and used in teas or infusions to leverage its medicinal benefits.
